messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0076",
  "title": "核心战斗与玩法体验",
  "page_index": 30,
  "page_range": "30"
}

Section text:

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading "核心战斗与玩法体验" (Core Combat and Gameplay Experience) on page 30. It can only answer high-level structural or navigational questions regarding the document's organization, specifically identifying that this page is designated for the topic of core combat mechanics and gameplay experience. It contains no substantive body text, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types, and therefore cannot answer detailed factual, procedural, or analytical questions.
